description_long: This object is a rectangular jewelry display case, commonly found in urban retail environments such as jewelry stores or market stalls. The case features a transparent glass or acrylic upper enclosure with a metal frame, allowing clear visibility of the jewelry items inside. The base is solid, likely made of wood or metal, with a brown trim at the bottom and a gray central section. Inside the case, several jewelry trays or pads are arranged on a red surface, each holding multiple pieces of jewelry, possibly rings, bracelets, or necklaces. The display is organized and compartmentalized, with the trays separated into distinct sections. The overall design is functional and secure, prioritizing visibility and protection for the jewelry items on display.
description: A rectangular glass display case with a metal frame and solid base, containing organized trays of jewelry on a red surface. Designed for secure and visible presentation of jewelry in urban retail settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the display case, with the glass enclosure and red jewelry trays clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the case and the arrangement of jewelry trays from front to back.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but with fewer jewelry trays visible, emphasizing the transparent enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the case's depth and the layout of trays.
